priority_basis: M-005 was the latest completed continuity slice; subsequent repository state exposed a higher-order coordination gap because owner-scoped queue projections had advanced while the canonical ACTIVE_QUEUE.json remained stale.

superseded: The implicit assumption that append-only queue projections and canonical queue state are automatically synchronized

next_action: Specify and test a deterministic queue reconciler that validates ownership, ancestry, timestamps, status monotonicity, artifact existence, conflict handling, and reversible canonical materialization.
